reviews.review_description: Got it on a friend's advice and it's fantastic. So much fun and energy. Plays smoothly, zero issues. Definitely worth buying

Meteoric VR is a hidden gem! 
It’s a fresh, original, positive, and adrenaline-filled game. It works great in both virtual reality and mixed reality: hand tracking is surprisingly accurate, the minimalist graphics are elegant, the colors are well chosen, and the shooting feedback is very satisfying.

In Mixed Reality mode, you can now scan multiple rooms and move freely between them — running around, turning corners, and surprising a UFO… or even punching it if it gets too close! 

What’s amazing is that it doesn’t need any changes: it just needs to be seen, understood, and appreciated. It’s intuitive and fun from the very first minutes.

I honestly don’t understand why such a good game hasn’t reached a wider audience yet. Maybe it’s because many people stick to the same old games — often repetitive and requiring little movement — while when something new and exciting comes along, only the truly curious ones recognize its value.

But for those who are still eager to be surprised, this game delivers.
It’s a game for anyone who still wants to be amazed by something original, well-crafted, and fully functional.

Highly recommended.


--------






in mixed reality there is a bug where the bonuses that appear when meteorites explode remain suspended in mid-air and cannot be grabbed, even if you try to grab them it doesn't work. 

plus the new type of bullet you fire is a little uglier than the previous one. the previous one was a sphere with a very small tail and had a more fluid animation, this instead is a sphere that has a flashing effect but the animation is not fluid, that is, when the shot is fired and crosses the room until it collides with the wall, the path it follows does not appear fluid, as if it were jerky.

however in VR mode it is better.

I hope you can improve it in the next update, or at least make it look like before. 

then in VR mode that big sun that I see to my right, it would be nice if it had a light animation effect, which however does not penalize the framerate.

I saw that you ironically inserted the middle finger gesture that fires a special projectile. I would have preferred that you insert some new gestures that are really valid, pleasant to perform, but perhaps you thought that that gesture could be pleasant for many people 😅
Fun game, mixed reality is really fun!

I tried 4 free games this morning and this was the only keeper. I loved a Kinect game called Child of Eden that used this motion. That also made my arms feel like they might fall off. Fantastic! Easy to pick up and addictive. Lots to do already and it's still free. I'll be spreading the word about this!

developer_response.body: Thank you! I didn’t know the Child of Eden. Visual effects are cool there ✨

reviews.review_description: Worth playing in passtrough mode, looks amazing, a little complicated and 100% fun! Had some issuse with first-time installation but now everything is ok!

developer_response.body: Hi, it happens when you don't allow spatial or audio permissions on the game launch. I'm working on a fix and a new update should be available this week. In the meantime, try to reinstall the game and allow permissions on the launch. I'm sorry for this trouble and thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed playing the game.. was quite a coincidence that I have “bumped into it” while being in AppLab. TBH, I do not really underatand why it is availible just via AppLab… this game is high quality , fun to play and with innovative game mechanics and now even include Mixed VR! Go ahead and download it, it is really fun to play. GJ.. we need more games like this one!

reviews.review_title: Great game if you have space for MR
reviews.review_description: I’d suggest you map out two connecting rooms. So you go back and forth between the two.  Mane just  needs more enemy types.

reviews.review_title: Hello, I think i just bought this game,
reviews.review_description: However, can any1 tell me how 2 get this game ont my headset.... ;)

developer_response.body: Hello, do you still have the problem? You should have the game on your headset when you click on the "Get" button or try to search "Meteoric VR" in the Store app.

reviews.review_description:
Great fun. Really has that arcadey just one more go feel.

It says it's usable with hand tracking but nothing I do makes it switch. I reckon it would be MUCH better without the controllers getting in the way.

developer_response.body: Yes, it depends on the light condition and how fast you move with your hands. It's playable but if you want to master then controllers are the way. On the other hand, it is a more natural way to play and you don't have to replace/charge batteries in your controllers which means less electricity and battery waste. The hand tracking is getting better every year and it is based on the Quest hardware and software. We use hand tracking version 2 with maximum frequency. Thank you for your review!

reviews.review_title: Breaking News, Asteroids Headed To Earth
reviews.review_description:
Meteoric VR is fun active arcade shooter that gets you up and moving. You don't even need controllers for this game, its that easy to play. You move by actually moving. You shoot by moving your hand in different ways for different effects. 

Blasting asteroids away like Ironman just feels amazing. The aiming of the game is very easy to pickup and master. Moving around and dodging is all you. The game gets you feeling excitement as you blast your way through a crazy amount of asteroids fly at you from all directions. Your heart will be pumping.

The game multiple ways of playing. Single player campaign, with 8 challenging levels, and a Moon stage to come. There is also endless mode in single player, where you play until you just can't handle the rush of asteroids anymore and your planet is crushed. There is also multiplayer modes to pick from. Even one where the other player can use their cell phone to attack you. I only had a chance to play the single player modes, and can say they are a fun challenge. 

This is one of those games you keep playing because you are just having easy joyful fun, and getting a workout at the same time. If you are into games that have you physically move to play, this one is a must have. The game is very immersive and just feel natural in the movements. The arcade factor to it will keep you grinding for a better score, and collect crystals for upgrades.

Watch my preview here,
https://youtu.be/yXSXsPvG4Uk

I never write reviews but this game is so simple, yet so elegant. It truly feels like a natural fit for hand tracking. Might as well be a Ironman game (don't tell Disney)

One thing for the devs, maybe I missed it but I had no idea this game had hand tracking support until I put down my controllers for a second to do something and then I realized it works with just hands.

I love the game simple to pick up and play a level but hard to learn and master the mechanics but the game just feels so small the campaign is very little content and the challenges take ten minutes max so please make a large expansion for the moon update and maybe some more abilities like upgrading your blast or upgrade paths like a choice between more damage or faster shots other than that this is a masterpiece

Seriously, just get this game. Even though it’s on app lab, it feels like a full game. Download the Meteoric VR app on your phone (or get other people too) so you can play with friends. The hand tracking feels amazing when your using it and it’s a perfect* game!

*Almost. There are only a few things you can buy in the shop, but that’s my only complaint.
Brilliant game walkthrough is very good .  Shame I  died to quick. As I was just beginning to love ❤️  the game .this could do with different Levels Easy medium and hard.
it's cool.  there's a duplicate on the store btw
Got the game for free cause I played the beta, cool game I recommend 👍
Tbh it’s the best shooter game it’s cool but can you add more skins and abilities?
I touched ur mum

Hi you might remember me from the how do I play meteoric vr in mobile device question well it worked and now I can play the game with friends the game is awesome the hand tracking the challenges it’s just awesome 10/10 I will recommend to  my friends

developer_response.body:
For mobile multiplayer you need to download Meteoric VR on your phone. See the links below. To be able to play multiplayer you need to create a mobile room in the VR game and enter the room code into the phone game. Let me know if there is any problem with the connection and thank you for your feedback!

iOS:  https://apps.apple.com/us/app/meteoric-vr/id1574498925
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.meteoric.android
